Truckee's riverfront park on West River Street — Dewbeyúmuweɂ is a Washoe name meaning 'the water running out,' honoring the Truckee River as Lake Tahoe's outlet. It opened to the public in October 2025.

Dozens of sites around Donner Summit where petroglyphs were incised into granite, within view of the surrounding peaks — no one knows what the abstract symbols mean. Reached from Donner Pass Road near Truckee.
